Partner With Egyzon

Grow Your Business With Us

Businesses, brands, manufacturers, and entrepreneurs can expand their reach by partnering with our marketplace.

Why Partner With Us

We provide the ecosystem, tools, and audience you need to scale your online sales rapidly.

Reach More Customers

Access thousands of shoppers across Egypt and expand your reach.

Easy Store Management

Manage products, inventory, and orders efficiently in one place.

Secure Payments

Receive payments through reliable and secure channels.

Marketing Opportunities

Participate in promotions and seasonal campaigns to boost sales.

Logistics Flexibility

Ship through preferred couriers or use our integrated solutions.

Dedicated Support

Get assistance from our dedicated seller success team anytime.

Who Can Join

Registered Companies
SMEs
Manufacturers
Brand Owners
Authorized Distributors
Home Businesses
Small Stores

Required Documents

Prepare these documents to ensure a smooth onboarding process.

Companies

  • Commercial Registration
  • Tax Card
  • Representative National ID
  • Bank Account Information
  • Brand Authorization (if applicable)

Stores

  • Store License or Registration
  • Tax Identification Number
  • Owner's National ID
  • Bank Account Details
  • Brand Authorization (if applicable)

Seller Responsibilities

We maintain a high standard for our customers. Here is what we expect from you.

Maintain accurate product information.
Keep inventory updated.
Ship orders within agreed timelines.
Respond to customer inquiries promptly.
Comply with Egyptian laws.
Avoid counterfeit or prohibited items.
Maintain high customer satisfaction standards.

Fees & Commission

We believe in transparent pricing to help you grow without unexpected costs. Our fees are structured around the services you use, which may include:

Category CommissionsAdvertising ServicesPayment ProcessingLogistics Services

Detailed pricing and commission structures are shared during the onboarding process.

How It Works

Start selling in 5 easy steps.

1

Submit Request

Fill out the partnership request.

2

Verification

We verify your submitted documents.

3

Approval

Get approved to become a partner.

4

Store Setup

We assist you in setting up your store.

5

Start Selling

List your products and start selling!

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does approval take?
Approval typically takes 2-4 business days after all required documents are submitted and verified.
When do sellers receive payments?
Payments are settled on a weekly or bi-weekly basis, depending on your seller tier and bank processing times.
Can individuals join?
Yes! We welcome individual entrepreneurs and home businesses. You will just need to provide your National ID and relevant details.
Are there monthly fees?
There are no hidden monthly subscription fees. We operate on a commission-based model depending on your product category.
How does shipping work?
You can choose to use our integrated fulfillment network or manage shipping via your preferred couriers.
Who provides customer support?
We provide Tier 1 customer support for shoppers. For specific product inquiries, our team will coordinate directly with you.

Ready to Grow Your Business?

Join our marketplace and unlock new opportunities to scale your business.

Experience shopping like never before! Discover the best products, deals, and partnerships all in one place.
